'''âr-g-r-s''' ('''karagresoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:join|join]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-g-r-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:join|join]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-g-r-s
|-
! Lemma
| karagresoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiragresoko|thiragresoko]] || [[word:jiragresoko|jiragresoko]] || [[word:shiragresoko|shiragresoko]] || [[word:kiragresoko|kiragresoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuragresoko|thuthuragresoko]] || [[word:jujuragresoko|jujuragresoko]] || [[word:shushuragresoko|shushuragresoko]] || [[word:kukuragresoko|kukuragresoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuragresoko|thuragresoko]] || [[word:juragresoko|juragresoko]] || [[word:shuragresoko|shuragresoko]] || [[word:kuragresoko|kuragresoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theragresoko|theragresoko]] || [[word:jeragresoko|jeragresoko]] || [[word:sheragresoko|sheragresoko]] || [[word:keragresoko|keragresoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoragresoko|thothoragresoko]] || [[word:jojoragresoko|jojoragresoko]] || [[word:shoshoragresoko|shoshoragresoko]] || [[word:kokoragresoko|kokoragresoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoragresoko|thoragresoko]] || [[word:joragresoko|joragresoko]] || [[word:shoragresoko|shoragresoko]] || [[word:koragresoko|koragresoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoragresoko|thoragresoko]] || [[word:joragresoko|joragresoko]] || [[word:shoragresoko|shoragresoko]] || [[word:koragresoko|koragresoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠragresoko|thĂŠragresoko]] || [[word:jĂŠragresoko|jĂŠragresoko]] || [[word:shĂŠragresoko|shĂŠragresoko]] || [[word:kĂŠragresoko|kĂŠragresoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharagresoko|thatharagresoko]] || [[word:jajaragresoko|jajaragresoko]] || [[word:shasharagresoko|shasharagresoko]] || [[word:kakaragresoko|kakaragresoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharagresoko|tharagresoko]] || [[word:jaragresoko|jaragresoko]] || [[word:sharagresoko|sharagresoko]] || [[word:karagresoko|karagresoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharagresoko|tharagresoko]] || [[word:jaragresoko|jaragresoko]] || [[word:sharagresoko|sharagresoko]] || [[word:karagresoko|karagresoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
